name: servants-kitchen
summary: Where the meals are prepared — a hearth or oven, a prep table, hanging pots, the clutter of active cooking.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangular, often with a clear cooking wall and a prep floor

primary_palette.note: hearth-cooking kitchen — fire on one wall, prep in the center
baker-cook's kitchen — oven dominates, table beside
roasting kitchen — whole animals over flame
stew-kitchen — table, block, and a pot always on
large-scale kitchen feeding a garrison — multiple ovens

story_prompts: mid-prep — meat on the block, onions sliced, the cook briefly stepped away
burnt-out kitchen after a fire — soot walls, a collapsed oven
abandoned servants' kitchen, pots still hanging, dust on everything
orc kitchen — bones, filth, a still-smoking fire
anti_patterns: don't center the oven — it belongs against a wall with chimney access
don't forget clutter — a working kitchen is never tidy
avoid fine dining furniture; this is a service room, not a dining room
